description: Eval cases: skill should be invoked for explicit optimization/performance asks; description and body are aligned with PR #2 testing pattern.

cases.prompt: How do I optimize this MongoDB find? db.orders.find({ status: 'open' }).sort({ createdAt: -1 })
How should I index this aggregation $match so it uses an index? $match: { shopId: ObjectId('...'), date: { $gte: ISODate('2024-01-01') } }
Why is this query performing badly on my cluster? It's a find with filter on serialCode and sort by _id.
What are the slow queries on my cluster? Which should I fix first?
Can you fix my slow queries? I have indexes but things are still slow.
Write a find query for users where status is active and limit 10.
